[cron:ghl-lead-scoring-6h ghl-lead-scoring] GHL LEAD SCORING (URGENT-ONLY REPORTING): Query GHL API for contacts modified in last 6 hours and calculate lead_score as configured. Update lead_score custom field. If any contact scores 90+, send immediate urgent alert and return a concise urgent summary. If no hot leads or urgent items, return blank.
Current time: Saturday, March 21st, 2026 — 18:32 (America/Chicago) / 2026-03-21 23:32 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
